subject: refactor(timeline): extract chart data builders into useTimelineCharts hook
body:
Audit finding extension to #16 — sections/Timeline.jsx was 735 lines,
235 over the 500-line component soft-limit. The five chart-data
useMemo blocks (activityChart, codeChangesChart, urgencyTrend,
debtTrend, impactTrend) made up ~350 lines of the file and had no
React-render surface area — they're pure data shaping with theme
colour resolution.

Extracted into a new hook:

  dashboard/js/hooks/useTimelineCharts.js  (416 lines)

The hook calls useApp() internally and returns all five chart-data
objects from a single call. Each useMemo retains its original
dependency array
(filteredCommits, commitsLoaded, state.data?.summary?.daily,
isMobile, state.darkMode, state.themeAccent, state.themeMuted) so
fine-grained memoization behaviour matches the previous inline
version exactly — a single chart still rebuilds independently of
the others when its inputs change.

After:
  dashboard/js/sections/Timeline.jsx: 735 → 390 lines (-345, well
    under the 500-line soft-limit)
  dashboard/js/hooks/useTimelineCharts.js: new (416 lines)

Timeline.jsx now imports the hook and replaces the five useMemo
blocks with a single destructuring call. The summaryData useMemo,
commitListContent useMemo, handleCardClick / handlePeriodClick
callbacks, and the entire JSX render tree are unchanged.

The hook's `urgencyTrendData` includes a `sortedMonths` field so
`impactTrendData` can reuse the date axis (alignment requirement
preserved from the pre-extraction version where impactTrendData
read `urgencyTrendData?.sortedMonths` from the closure).

Imports trimmed in Timeline.jsx — getAdditions, getDeletions,
getUTCMonthKey, excludeIncompleteLastMonth, getSeriesColor,
withOpacity, buildRepoColorMap are no longer needed in the
component file (they live in the hook now).

Test fixup:
  scripts/__tests__/daisyui-surfaces.test.mjs "Chart.js components
  read theme accent" test now reads dashboard/js/hooks/useTimelineCharts.js
  for the >=2 state.themeAccent assertion. Added a sanity
  assertion on Timeline.jsx that it still imports the hook so
  accidental in-lining is caught.

Build clean (562.43 kB → 562.43 kB, identical post-tree-shake).
60/60 tests pass.

Tags: refactor, ui, code-organization, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vanilla-daisyui-cleanup
Semver: patch
